headline: Bristol Myers Squibb turns to China to develop new drugs in newest cross-continent collaboration
summary: U.S. drugmaker Bristol Myers Squibb inked a partnership with a Chinese company that some say could mark the next wave of collaboration across continents.

raw.headline: Bristol Myers Squibb turns to China to develop new drugs in newest cross-continent collaboration
raw.summary: U.S. drugmaker Bristol Myers Squibb inked a partnership with a Chinese company that some say could mark the next wave of collaboration across continents.

headline: Reported Earlier, Gilead Sciences Prices $3B Senior Unsecured Notes In Four Tranches: $500M At 4.250% Due 2028, $1B At 4.400% Due 2029, $1B At 4.600% Due 2031 And $500M At 4.900% Due 2034
summary: Gilead intends to use the net proceeds from this offering for general corporate purposes, which may include funding for acquisitions, investments, strategic transactions or other business opportunities.

raw.headline: Reported Earlier, Gilead Sciences Prices $3B Senior Unsecured Notes In Four Tranches: $500M At 4.250% Due 2028, $1B At 4.400% Due 2029, $1B At 4.600% Due 2031 And $500M At 4.900% Due 2034

headline: Gilead Prices $3 Billion of Senior Unsecured Notes
summary: FOSTER CITY, Calif., May 15, 2026--Gilead Sciences, Inc. (Nasdaq: GILD), a biopharmaceutical company that has pursued and achieved breakthroughs in medicine for more than three decades, today announced the pricing of senior unsecured notes in an aggregate principal amount of $3 billion, in an underwritten, registered public offering, consisting of $500 million of 4.250% senior notes maturing in 2028, $1 billion of 4.400% senior notes maturing in 2029, $1 billion of 4.600% senior notes maturing i
